generation.prompt_used: Pixel art game environment scene. dark fantasy pixel game environment, moody ruins, restrained colors, readable game-map composition. top-down pixel game scene, map-like layout, readable walkable paths. first-pass draft, prioritize strong composition and scene readability. mood: 神秘. User scene brief: 森林神殿入口，黄昏，像素风，俯视角，有苔藓石阶和发光符文. Render as a usable game-scene draft rather than a poster. Use chunky readable forms, limited color regions, clear walkable layout, crisp edges, light tile-map logic, simple materials, strong scene hierarchy. Constraints: no photorealism; no painterly brush strokes; no blurry gradients; no realistic camera depth of field; no dense texture noise; no glossy 3d render look; readable silhouettes; limited palette feeling; clean tile-friendly composition.
